name: radio-group-demo
visual_summary: A radio group, also known as a radio button group, is a collection of radio buttons that allow the user to select one option from a list. It is typically used when there are multiple exclusive options to choose from. This component is useful when a user needs to select one item from a set of options.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready radio component with the following characteristics:

Name: radio-group-demo
Description: A radio group, also known as a radio button group, is a collection of radio buttons that allow the user to select one option from a list. It is typically used when there are multiple exclusive options to choose from. This component is useful when a user needs to select one item from a set of options.
Style: e.g. minimal, glassmorphism
Interactions: e.g. clickable, disabled
Tags: radio, group, buttons, selection

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
